mapper.select: SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, account_balance, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE id = #{id} AND delmark = 0

SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, account_balance, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE id_card = #{idCard} AND delmark = 0

SELECT p.id, p.real_name, p.id_card, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.phone, p.avatar, p.home_address, p.allergy_history, p.account_balance, p.delmark, p.create_time, p.update_time, COALESCE(upm.relation, '本人') AS relation, CASE WHEN COALESCE(upm.relation, '本人') = '本人' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_primary FROM patient p INNER JOIN user_patient_managed upm ON p.id = upm.patient_id WHERE upm.user_id = #{userId} AND p.delmark = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(upm.relation, '本人') = '本人' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, p.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, delmark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{realName}, #{idCard}, #{gender}, #{birthdate}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{homeAddress}, #{allergyHistory}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE patient
real_name = #{realName},
gender = #{gender},
birthdate = #{birthdate},
phone = #{phone},
home_address = #{homeAddress},
allergy_history = #{allergyHistory},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, account_balance, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE id = #{id} AND delmark = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET account_balance = #{accountBalance}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delmark = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE patient SET delmark = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, account_balance, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE delmark = 0 AND ( real_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(id AS TEXT) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY real_name ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

where.if: AND ( real_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id_card ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(id AS TEXT) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, home_address, allergy_history, account_balance, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, home_address, allergy_history, account_balance, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET delmark = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
